## How To Use

1. Run Task Orchestrator Agent for a feature.
2. Review summaries in this file after each stage.
3. Mark decision in the Stage Status table.
4. Reply in chat with your decision (Approve / Request Changes / Hold).
5. Continue stage-by-stage.
